account_deletion_description: You can request the deletion of your account and all associated data. This action is irreversible once processed.
existing_request_body: You have already submitted an account deletion request. Current status:
existing_request_note: If you have questions, please contact our support team.
warning_body: Requesting account deletion will initiate the permanent removal of your account and all associated data, including:
delete_item_classes: Your class history and attendance records
warning_note: Some data may be retained for legal or regulatory compliance purposes. Once processed, this action cannot be undone.
confirm_deletion_label: I understand that this will permanently delete my account and associated data.
